products_knowledge.details: We offer Mono PERC and Polycrystalline panels. Mono PERC gives 20% efficiency, Poly gives 17% efficiency. All panels have 25 years performance warranty.
Solar pumps are available from 3HP to 20HP. Surface pumps for open wells, submersible for borewells. Works on DC directly or AC with inverter.
We have three types: On-grid (no battery), Off-grid (with battery), Hybrid (grid + battery + solar). Choose based on your needs.

technical_knowledge.details: For borewell depth up to 200ft: 3HP pump sufficient. 200-300ft: 5HP pump needed. 300-400ft: 7.5HP pump. Beyond 400ft: 10HP+ pump.
3HP pump delivers 30,000-40,000 L/hr. 5HP delivers 50,000-60,000 L/hr. Actual depends on head and sunlight.
Each 1HP pump needs 1kW solar panels. So 3HP pump needs 3kW panels (approx 8 panels of 400W).

process_knowledge.details: Our engineer visits your farm to check: borewell depth, water level, land location, sun exposure. Free site visit within 50km.
We handle all subsidy paperwork. Required documents: Aadhar card, land documents, bank passbook, recent photo.
After order confirmation, installation within 7-10 days. Foundation work takes 2 days, electrical work 2 days, commissioning 1 day.
